name: PALATIN TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: Palatin is a biopharmaceutical company developing first-in-class medicines based on molecules that modulate the activity of the melanocortin receptor (MCR) system. The company develops targeted, receptor-specific therapeutics for diseases with significant unmet medical need, focusing on MC4R agonists for obesity and MC1R agonists for inflammatory and autoimmune diseases. It also has an FDA-approved product, Vyleesi, which was sold to Cosette Pharmaceuticals in December 2023.

exposures.sentence: Palatin is a biopharmaceutical company developing first-in-class medicines based on molecules that modulate the activity of the melanocortin receptor (MCR) system.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 topline data for bremelanotide co-administration with tirzepatide in obesity
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of calendar year 2025, we reported positive topline data in a Phase 2 clinical study for the treatment of obesity with co-administration of the melanocortin agonist bremelanotide with tirzepatide, a GLP-1 (glucagon-like peptide-1) agonist.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 topline data for PL8177 in ulcerative colitis
catalysts.sentence: Topline data in a Phase 2 study in ulcerative colitis using our polymer-encapsulated, delayed-release, oral formulation of PL8177 was reported in the first quarter of calendar year 2025.

catalysts.event: IND filing for long-acting peptide MC4R agonist
catalysts.sentence: We are advancing lead compound selection activities with a plan to initiate Investigational New Drug (IND) enabling activities for a novel MC4R selective long-acting agonist later this year, and plan to file an IND in the first quarter of calendar year 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential start of additional Phase 3 studies for PL9643
catalysts.sentence: Additional Phase 3 studies could start as early as the first half of calendar year 2026.

catalysts.event: Upfront payment from Boehringer Ingelheim collaboration received
catalysts.sentence: Under the terms of the Agreement, we received an upfront payment of $2,300,000 (received September 2025) and may receive up to $21,200,000 in near-term research milestone payments...

catalysts.event: Research milestone payment from Boehringer Ingelheim expected
catalysts.sentence: On September 22, 2025, we announced the achievement of a research milestone under its collaboration with Boehringer Ingelheim. This milestone triggers a payment to us of approximately $6,500,000 (expected to be received in October 2025).

tamClaims.claim: Dry eye disease is estimated to affect over 30 million people in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated to affect over 30 million people in the United States.
